# Preface to the {{< var ay >}} presentation {.unnumbered}

Welcome to the {{< var ay >}} edition of online supporting material for the MP968 workshop in Experimental Design.

This site presents some of the material we will go over in more detail, with interactive examples and walkthroughs of the practical work.

If you encounter problems or would like to tell us what you like and would want to see more of, we would be very grateful to hear feedback [by email]({{< var admin.email >}}) or through the [GitHub repository Issues page]({{< var github.issues >}}).
